heading: Salaries of Representatives, Delegates, and Resident Commissioners elected for unexpired terms
label: 5304 Salaries of Representatives, Delegates, and Resident Commissioners elected for unexpired terms
text: The salaries of Representatives in Congress, Delegates from Territories, and Resident Commissioners, elected for unexpired terms, shall commence on the date of their election and not before.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 37 of this title
